task_completion.description: Partition the space to create at least 4 sleep rooms and 1 tech control room.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Sweet Home 3D 2D plan view, look for newly drawn interior walls that clearly divide the open shell into at least 4 separate individual patient rooms and 1 centralized room (tech control room).

task_completion.description: Place doors on all rooms and restrooms for privacy.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for door symbols in the 2D plan or 3D view connecting the newly created sleep rooms, tech room, and restrooms to the main hallways/areas.

task_completion.description: Furnish the sleep rooms with at least 4 beds, 4 nightstands, and 4 ambient lamps.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look in the 2D plan or 3D view for furniture models representing beds, nightstands, and lamps distributed among the 4 sleep rooms (at least one of each per room, totaling 4 of each).

task_completion.description: Equip the tech control room with at least 2 workstations, 2 office chairs, and 4 monitors/computers.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look in the centralized tech room for at least 2 desk/workstation models, 2 office chair models, and 4 computer/monitor models placed on the desks.

task_completion.description: Furnish the reception area with 4 seats and a desk, and restrooms with 2 toilets and 2 sinks.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a reception area containing at least 4 seating models (chairs/sofas) and 1 desk. Look in the restroom areas for at least 2 toilet models and 2 sink/basin models.

task_completion.description: Annotate the rooms with text labels.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for text labels placed on the 2D plan view identifying the different areas (e.g., 'Sleep Room', 'Tech Room', 'Reception').

integrity.description: Agent used the Sweet Home 3D graphical interface to design the clinic.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Sweet Home 3D application open with the mouse cursor interacting with the catalog, 2D plan, or toolbars, rather than terminal commands editing the .sh3d file programmatically.

integrity.description: Agent worked on the correct starter file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Sweet Home 3D window title bar should display 'sleep_clinic_starter.sh3d'.

integrity.description: The 3D view updates consistently with the 2D plan.
integrity.visual_evidence: The bottom 3D view pane in Sweet Home 3D should show the 3D models of the walls, doors, and furniture that correspond to the items placed in the top 2D plan pane.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The agent must modify 'sleep_clinic_starter.sh3d' in Sweet Home 3D. Required features include wall creation (partitioning 4 sleep rooms and 1 tech room), door placement for privacy, furniture placement across sleep rooms, tech room, reception, and restrooms, and label placement (text annotations for rooms).
